name: How do I file a workers comp claim after falling off ladder at work?

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim after falling off ladder at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer in writing, file Form 111, see doctor, keep records.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Report the injury to your employer immediately**, ideally in writing, then file Form 111 for workers' comp.[3]

Your employer must notify their insurer; you'll get medical treatment authorization.[1] Keep all records for approval.

- See approved doctor for exam.
- Submit wage loss if off work.
- Appeal denials within 20 days in Utah.

Track symptoms; delayed issues strengthen claims. Get legal help for disputes.

description: Report to employer in writing, file Form 111, see doctor, keep records.
